titleStmt.title: SII 15.31: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 31. (B.K. No. 430 of 1926.) AMMINABHĀVI, DHARWAR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying in front of Jaina Basti.
This is dated the 8th year of the king's reign, Krōdhana, Phālguṇa-amāvāsyā corresponding to 1146 A.D., March 14.

It states that on the occasion when the Tulāpurusha ceremony was performed by the king at Kōṭitīrtha on the Gautama-gaṅgā river, Mahāpradhāna, Paṭṭasāhaṇi, Kaḍitavergaḍe, Kannaḍa-Sandhivigrahi, Daṇḍanāyaka Bammaṇayya, having made the gifts of Gōsahasra, Prithvīdāna and Saptasāgara, restored the agrahāra of Ammayanabāvi and donated a piece of land to the god Mūlasthāna of the place. The Four Hundred Mahājanas of agrahāra Ammayanabāvi are praised. It also records gifts to the same deity made by the Mahājanas, Twelve Gāvuṇḍas and the Nakharas of the place. The epigraph is damaged and worn out.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyā
malladēvara vijayarājya muttarō
ttamire [.] śrīmadbhūlōkamallakṣitipati
sthānadoḷu bhaṭṭanōrvvaṁ śrīmaccāḷukya
yadaṁ prēmātmaṁ tāsyaripunṛpagaja kaṇṭhīravaṁ nōḍuttirddu .
ḷ tatsabhāṁtarvarttiyenisiṟda sukavijanaṁgaḷella caḷukyānva yamaṁ sānvayamāgi tiḷiputta
śrīmadajjayyanenisi negarttevetta piriya permmāḍidēvana rājyābhivṛddhiyaṁ baṇṇisuva
vasaradoḷu śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvana bilagoṁḍada vīranārāyaṇadēvara kṣētra
mumaṁ taddharmmaprabhāvamumaṁ pogaḷuttamirppavasaradoḷ . kritamati paṭṭasāhaṇi manō
diṁ jagadēkamallabhūpatige viśuddhabuddhi tiḷipalsamayādigaḷiṁde keṭṭudiṁnati śaya mā
yanabāviyanīgaḷe māḷpudeṁdu bhūnuta bammaṇacamūpati permme yaneyde tāḷdidaṁ .
doḷammayanabāvi dharitriyoḷagrahāradoḷtiḷakadavōlvirājipudu bilagoṇḍada dēva
ḷamavi ddhamāytu samayādigaḷilnilisalke takkanaṁ kaḷipalevēḷkumeṁdu naḍarkki gaḷeru
vanaṁ . paḍevaḷaranaṭṭi baraloḍanuḍalittammayanabāvi ninna taḍeyade pōpudu nī
ḍeya pramukha prasiddha nālnūrvvarumaṁ . nīna samartthanammayana bāvige ninnade rājatējame
mmaṇacamūpati kūrttuḍalikke rājyalakṣmīniḷayaṁ sarāgadi ltaḷedaṁ prabhu ru
tanāśritaprakarakaḷpakujaṁ guṇaratnabhūṣaṇaṁ . dartthi prakarakkekaḷpa
kke durddharatībrāṁtakanāśritapratatigāvārāśibandhupriyācara
tānenisidaṁ śrī rudradēvaṁ dharādharadhairyyaṁ bhuvanastutaṁ parahitabyāpā
ridirāda durjanaranāgaḷe śikṣise duṣṭakaṣṭaraṁ moneyoḷe kā
pudeṁdu rudradēvanadhikāralakṣmi verasāgaḷ bīḷkoḷisalke mājanamanaśē
baḷiyaṭṭi manōnurāgadiṁ . paramādaradiṁ nālnūrvaru maṁ baḷiyaṭṭi rudra
dirggoṁḍu pūrvvāparamaṁ tiḷipidanaśēṣanālnūrvarigaṁ .About eight letters are erased
sāhaṇi daṇḍanāthatiḷakaṁ vibudhāgraṇi bammadēvanuṁAbout eight letters are erased here.
cakravarttiyaṟiyalparamēśvaradattiyāytenalkāhavadhīrana mmayana bā
mmaḍi permmeyappinaṁ . teṟediṟalāṟadirddavana vṛttige nūrvvaru vuḷḷa lekkamaṁ tiṟuvu
ṇnamiya parvvabiyaṁbirevātanaṁśamaneṟe tiḷidā sthaḷakke kaṁḍanāduda
ḷu poraṟiyalaśēṣamaṁ tiḷipi nūrvvaraśēṣa mirdda patramaṁ . nērvvaṭṭaśēṣami
ru voroḍeyamukhya gāvuṇḍarppannirvvarppaṁcamaṭhaṁ sakaḷō rvvigivarppiriyare
maṁṭapadoḷ . piriya sabhāmaṁṭapadoḷnerevudu nālnūrvarēkamata
maṁ tiḷidotteyanādaradiṁ biḍisuvadu pūrvigareṁdu nilal . vṛtta . biḍisuva
tada poṁgaḷa nimmaḍigeydu pūrvadiṁdoḍeyarenirppavarvviḍisi koḷvudu kā
ri poṇdada biḍasirddavarmmaguḷ māṟuvudottayaniṭṭu koḷvudu roḍeya
yalu byavahārapathakramaṁgaḷaṁ . Avarivarennade samayabyava stheyaṁ mīṟi na
kondavargge parihārameṁtenalavane valaṁ śvāna gaṟdabhaṁ caṇḍāḷaṁ vacana . Intī grāmasama
roḍeyapramukha nālnūrvvarmmahājanaṁgaḷuvācaṁdrārkkatārannaḍe yisuttamire .
śrīmat pratāpacakravarti jagadēkamallābhyudayavarṣada 8 neya krōdhana saṁvatsara
da phālguṇadamavāsye byatīpātaṁ kūḍida puṇyatithiyoḷ gautamagaṁgānadiya kōṭi
ttapu doḷ śrīmat pratāpacakravartti jagadēkamalladēvaru tuḷāpuruṣama nēṟe dharmma
nāmaṁ kēḷuttamirppavasaradoḷ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ sēṇipati kaḍita verggaḍe kannaḍasaṁdhivigraReadsēnādhipati.
hi daṇḍanāyakaṁ bammaṇayyaṁgaḷ gōsahasraṁ prithvīdānaṁ saptasāgaraviṁtī mūṟuṁ
dānaṁgaḷaṁ māḍi śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvara pādārccaneyaṁ māḍi tanmuhūrta doḷ śrīma
dagrahāravammayanabāviyaṁ punarbbharaṇaṁ māḍiyalliya svayaṁbhu śrīmū
polanaṁ sarvvanamaśyaṁ sarvvabādhāparihāramāgi paḍedu biṭṭarā . ka . manaverggaḍe sēnā
dhipati piriyadaṇḍanāyakanakhiḷāvanivani pogaḷe paṭṭasāhaṇiyena negarddaṁ ba
sōmārkkabyōmavahniśvasanajaḷadharātmā mūrtti prakāśa śrīmūlasthā
mahimegaṁgabhōgakke munnaṁ grāmakkānandadidaṁ tiḻuvēḻu
prītāṁtarātmaṁ sakaḷajananutaṁ bammadaṇḍādhināthaṁ . Ā dēvara pola
meṁteṁdoḍe paḍuvalu pūliya daśakaṁ baḍa galu pervvaṭṭebēlibasadiya
yī mṛḍana volakkiṁtidalte caturāghāṭaṁ . Iṁtī polanumādēvara kēriyumaṁ
ramāgi biṭṭar . śrīmadammayanabāvi samastagrāmadoḷti ḷakamippaṁ
tuśśataviprar śrīmahēśvarapādāṁbujabhriṁgar .
catuśśata viprariṁdaḷaṁkarisi gavuṁḍuvargga pura varggadinūrjjitamāgi
śritakōṭige kaḷpabhūjadaṁtire siriyaṁte vārinidhiyaṁte
. kaṁda . kamaḷōdbhavavaṁśōdbhavaramaḷarśśiṣṭa vibudhadāridrya tamastimi
rnālnūrvarakhiḷavasudhātaḷadoḷ . svasti yamaniyama
nānuṣṭhāna parāyaṇa japasamādhiśīḷasaṁpannaruṁ vihi
taruṁ . lōkavikhyātaruṁ yajana yājanādhya
rataruṁ . kṣīrasāgaraśayyāsanōrasthaḷa
prasiddha rājapūjitaruṁ . samasta lōka
ciṁtāmaṇigaḷanisi negarttevetta śrīmanma
nā lnūrvvarmmahājanaṁgaḷuṁ pannirvvaggā vuṇḍu
dēvara naṁdādīvigegūroḍeya
dēvara pavitrārōhaṇakke nakharaṁgaḷaṁgaḍiya
meyyāgamaṁ kuḍuvar . Adhikārigaḷtavage naḍa
dīvigage biṭṭar [.] Arasugaḷu mūlegi
le talevoṟegayva ttaleyaṁ biṭṭar [.] grā
bīravaṇiga daṁgaḍiya navaṁ kuḍuva
rāgi nakharaṁgaḷ pratyayadalkoṭṭa gadyāṇavo
śśateśubhakṛtkāsanamuṁ lakṣmīsthiraśāsa
halasanmatta madhupana [Avi]kāra du
. śāsanamidāvudelliyaśāsanavārittarēke sa
ḷanaḷiguṁ . jinavarmmōjana kaṇḍaraṇe .
haṇa hāga
Digital edition of SII 15.31 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
